CustomField.description: Semicolon-separated list of Opportunity Type picklist values for which NPPatch should NOT automatically create Payment records. Opportunities with these Type values will not trigger automatic Payment creation, even when Automatic Payment Creation is enabled. Leave blank to allow Payments for all Types.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Opportunity Type values excluded from automatic Payment creation. Enter Type values separated by semicolons.
CustomField.label: Excluded Opp Types
